/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.9.5 -o ../../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.5.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml-blas.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml-blas.dir/ggml-blas.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ander.alvarez/dev/perso/turboquant-cpu/llama.cpp/build-arm-turboquant/bin ../../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.5.dylib -framework Accelerate
